# Third-party provenance

Android reviewer/build-diagnostic ideas were adapted on 2026-07-15 from `affaan-m/ECC`, commit `ed387446052dfbc6b52de149406b70efa65edc59`, source profiles `kotlin-reviewer.md` and `kotlin-build-resolver.md` at https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC. Copyright (c) 2026 Affaan Mustafa, MIT.

The Kotlin specialist lens was adapted on 2026-07-15 from `VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents`, commit `947b44ca0c58d606b084e9cb1a2389335b49278b`, source profile `kotlin-specialist.md` at https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents. Copyright (c) 2025 VoltAgent, MIT.

Both were rewritten as repository-specific read-only roles. Fixed tool versions, coverage thresholds, forced KMP/Arrow/Ktor/Hilt, fixed Gradle tasks and mandatory detekt/ktlint assumptions were removed. Full licenses: `licenses/ecc-mit.txt`, `licenses/voltagent-mit.txt`.
